examples: Placido Domingo sang his serenade of love.
I was informed that the lady for whose delectation I had been invited to sing was ill in bed, and that I would have to serenade her from her bedroom door.
I never tire of listening to this serenade.
If you are lucky, you will hear "Elvis" serenade the bride and groom.
Mariachi bands have also been hired to serenade the pontiff at his arrival.
